title: Pi CLI Startup
description: Boots the Pi CLI help path inside the sandbox.

samples.stdoutPreview:
pi - AI coding assistant with read, bash, edit, write tools

Usage:
  pi [options] [@files...] [messages...]

Commands:
  pi install <source> [-l]     Install extension source and add to settings
  pi remove <source> [-l]      Remove extens
samples.stderrPreview:
ProcessExitError: process.exit(0)

    at main (/home/nathan/se6/packages/secure-exec/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent/dist/main.js:571:13)
    at async <anonymous>:9:5
